title: rosa alpina var. balsamea
intro: Rosa alpina var. balsamea, also known as the Alpine Rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa alpina species, a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa alpina var. balsamea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antiseptic to aid in wound healing. Rosa alpina var. balsamea is typically prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
